llmResponse.agenda_changes: Three items moved to consent: 12.3 (Addendum to 2022-23 Measure U Application for Taft Community School), 12.4 (Denial of Classified General Leave Request), and 12.5 (Approval of Personnel Changes for 2022-2023). Item 11.2 (Acceptance of Redwood City Teachers Association's Sunshine Proposal) pulled from consent for separate discussion.
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: Can I have a motion to move those items? The moved second. All in favor? Aye.

items.intro_words: Good evening, everyone. Evelyn. Roll call, please.
Trustee McEvoy. Present. Trustee. Well, here.
Moving on to Item 4.2. Reporting out of closed session
Welcome, everyone. Thank you for attending our meeting this evening.
Do we have any changes to the agenda this evening?
Can I have a motion to approve the agenda?
Moving on to oral communication. 8.1. Evelyn, do we have any cards
Moving on to item nine, bond program consent items.
Can I have a motion to move them? So moved.
Discussion items, item 10.1. First reading and discussion of board policy
Moving on to 10.2. First reading and discussion of board policy
We'll move on to 10.3 first reading and discussion of board policy
Then move on to 10.4 first reading and discussion of board policy
Moving on to 10.5, first reading and discussion of board policy
Sorry about that. 10.6. First reading and discussion of board bylaws.
Moving on to 12.1 recommendation regarding adoption of Resolution 18 authorizing electronic
Now to 12.2 recommendation regarding approval of schools, school plans for student achievement.
Moving on to board reports. I am Superintendent reports.
Moving on to 14.1. Information on changes to administrative regulation.
14.2. Information on Samate County Investment fund. Any questions
Moving on to 15.1 correspondence. There was the email from Chris
16.1 possible other business or suggested items for future agendas.
And with that, can I have a motion to adjourn?
